messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0027",
  "title": "2025年中国移动游戏每季度新品全年收入TOP榜（仅App Store）（亿元）",
  "page_index": 10,
  "page_range": "10"
}

Section text:
## 2025年中国移动游戏每季度新品全年收入TOP榜（仅App Store）（亿元）

message.content: This section presents a quantitative ranking (table/figure) of top-grossing new mobile games in China for 2025, segmented by quarterly release cohorts and measuring full-year revenue exclusively on the App Store. It supports retrieval for questions regarding: **Topics/Entities:** Which specific mobile game titles released in each quarter of 2025 achieved the highest annual revenue on China’s iOS platform? **Dates/Timeframe:** How are 2025 quarterly release windows mapped to full-year revenue performance periods? **Metrics:** What are the exact revenue figures for top-ranking titles, quantified in 100 million RMB (亿元)? **Evidence Type:** A structured ranking dataset or chart restricted to App Store financial data. The section does not cover Android platforms, legacy/non-new titles, historical years, definitions, procedures, or non-revenue claims.
